action.reasoning: Observation: All 10 tasks trained successfully with 1M steps each (~17-19 min per task, total ~2.9h). All checkpoints exist under ckpt/. Analysis: Need to submit eval to see actual performance. With 6.47h remaining and 25 iterations, I have time for more training after seeing results. Decision: Submit eval immediately to get baseline scores.
